# Rough Heston consensus reference prices (r=0, V₀=θ)

Generated by `bin/collate_ref_table.py`. Two independent implementations agree:

| Pricer | Algorithm | Repository |
|--------|-----------|------------|
| Octave | Fractional Adams VIE solver | sigurdroemer/rough_heston |
| Workshop | Rational-approximation characteristic function | fbourgey/RoughVolatilityWorkshop2024 |

**Tolerance**: A row is admitted to consensus only when |Octave − Workshop| < 0.01 (1 penny per unit spot).
